rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts is unrelated to Educ. Code §37.081, which governs school district peace officers and security personnel. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 37.081. SCHOOL DISTRICT PEACE OFFICERS, SCHOOL RESOURCE OFFICERS, AND SECURITY PERSONNEL.
_note: No conflict; the proposed homestead exemption change has no bearing on school district peace officer provisions.
